task_description: Specification for fixing slow project switching through a Codex operational session index
runtime_adaptation: Codex runtime adaptation: the specification was produced directly in this session without spawning separate agents.

steps.name: init
steps.comment: Initialized spec-creator log directory and selected task type code_change.

steps.name: project-context-research
steps.comment: Read CLAUDE.md, RCA handoff, root-cause report, relevant code modules, tests, specs, and ADRs.

steps.name: requirements-analysis
steps.comment: Resolved requirements from the RCA handoff: no early switch confirmation, 4-day Codex index, mtime/cursor-first pending, and size-threshold guard.

steps.name: spec-authoring
steps.comment: Created final implementation specification in dev/docs/specs.

steps.name: self-review
steps.comment: Checked specification against RCA constraints, project architecture, no-table rule, and implementation readiness.
